overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Hogwarts Legacy showing a student character in a black robe with yellow crest walking through a snowy, overcast mountain landscape. The character travels along a winding snow-covered dirt path from an open area with stone ruins into a dense evergreen forest, encountering other travelers along the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley path with ancient stone ruins

events.description: two distant figures appear ahead on the path walking in the same direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered trail through the open mountain valley with ruins visible to the right

entered.detail: large dark stone wall ruins covered in snow on the right side of the path
winding dirt path covered in white snow extending into the distance
leafless trees with thin branches lining the left side of the valley
snow-capped mountains visible through the hazy overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open snowy mountain valley with a large stone ruin wall on the right. Bare deciduous trees line the path while distant mountains loom through the hazy overcast sky. Two figures appear in the far distance ahead on the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone from open ruins to dense evergreen forest

events.description: passes a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction on the left side of the path
exits the open ruin area and enters denser forest with evergreen trees

agents.ego_description: continuing along the snowy path and passing a traveler heading in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera, passing by on the left side of the trail at close range

entered.detail: tall dense pine trees with snow-covered branches becoming prominent on the right

segments.scene_description: The character passes a pedestrian walking the opposite way and transitions from the open ruin area into a denser forest environment. Evergreen pine trees begin to dominate the right side while the stone ruins fall behind. The path continues winding through the increasingly wooded landscape.

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the dense evergreen forest following the snowy trail toward a distant figure

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the path, gradually becoming more visible as the camera approaches

entered.detail: snow-covered fallen tree trunks and logs scattered beside the path
large rocks and boulders covered in snow on the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds through a dense snowy pine forest with tall evergreen trees enclosing the path on both sides. Fallen logs and snow-covered boulders line the trail. A distant figure remains visible ahead on the winding path as the forest becomes thicker and darker.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from an open, ruined mountain valley into the depths of a dense evergreen forest. It begins on a winding snow-covered path beside a large stone ruin wall, with bare deciduous trees and hazy mountains visible under an overcast sky. As the character passes a fellow traveler walking in the opposite direction, the open landscape gradually shifts into a wooded environment where towering pine trees begin to dominate the right side of the trail. The scene then closes in as the path leads deeper into a thick snowy forest, with fallen logs and snow-covered boulders lining the way. Finally, the surroundings become darker and more enclosed by tall evergreens while a distant figure remains visible further along the winding trail.
